title: 修复 YPI Studio SDK runner preflight 回退 CLI 问题

subagents.prompt: 请为本任务做架构/修复方案设计，暂不修改代码。背景：刚排查发现 YPI Studio subagent 在 `studio.subagents.runner=auto` 下全部回退 CLI。强制 sdk 同步暴露真实错误：`SDK child runner preflight failed before prompt execution: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '<child session jsonl>'`。原因疑…

subagents.prompt: 实现子任务 sdk-child-header-ensure：修复 SDK child session header 创建与写入时机。请先阅读任务 artifacts（prd/design/implement/checks）和相关代码，按实现计划修改代码，并记录验证结果。
subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — fixed SDK child session header writing so it can create the JSONL header when `SessionManager.create()` has not flushed the file yet; preserves `parentSession`, `projectId`, `spaceId`, and `studioChild` metadata.
- `lib/types.ts` — no changes needed.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- The fix marks the SDK `SessionManager` as flushed after manually creating the header, preventing later SDK persistence from using exclusive create (`wx`) against an already-created file.
- Remaining subtasks for fallback diagnostics and validation/docs were not implemented, per assigned boundary.

subagents.prompt: 实现子任务 runner-error-persistence：持久化 auto fallback 与强制 sdk async 失败诊断。请基于任务 artifacts 和上一子任务结果继续实现，确保 run/transcript/API 能暴露必要诊断信息并符合设计。
subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — implemented runner-error-persistence:
  - Preserves SDK preflight/fallback warnings across CLI fallback progress/final snapshots.
  - Writes fallback diagnostic status into transcript sidecar when available.
  - Persists forced `runner=sdk` preflight/runner failures as failed runs with `error`, `terminationReason`, failed transcript metadata, and progress warnings.
  - Registers an early SDK placeholder runtime handle to avoid async poll/collect racing into `runtime_lost`.
  - Exposes progress warnings in lifecycle/wait compact projections.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not modify unrelated files already present in the working tree.
- No manual Studio smoke run performed in this delegated subtask.

subagents.prompt: 请对任务“修复 YPI Studio SDK runner preflight 回退 CLI 问题”的实现进行代码审查和验证。重点检查：SDK child session header 写入时机、auto fallback/forced sdk 诊断持久化、API/transcript 投影、文档/验证脚本，以及是否有回归风险。请运行或核对必要验证并给出结论。
subagents.summary:
已完成检查，产物已写入：

- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-160855-修复-ypi-studio-sdk-runner-preflight-回退-cli-问题/review.md`

检查范围：

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-header.ts`
- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts`
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`
- `scripts/test-ypi-studio-sdk-runner.mjs`
- `package.json`
- `docs/modules/library.md`
- `docs/modules/api.md`

验证结果：

- `npm run test:studio-sdk-runner` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

结论：

- Pass
- 代码已覆盖本任务核心验收：  
  - SDK child session header 在 JSONL 未落盘时可安全创建
  - `auto` fallback 保留 SDK preflight 诊断到 run progress/warnings
  - 强制 `sdk` 的 async preflight/runner 失败会持久化为真实 failed，而不是只剩 `runtime_lost`
  - 文档与验证脚本已补齐

剩余风险：

- 非阻塞：`lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` 新增的 SDK 预注册占位 handle 修复了 `runtime_lost`，但若用户恰好在 SDK preflight 极短窗口内取消 async run，占位 `abort` 目前是 no-op，后续真实 handle 可能覆盖已取消状态。当前不影响本任务验收，但建议主会话决定是否补一个后续小修。

主会话需要决策：

- 是否接受上述“SDK preflight 期间 async cancel 窄窗口竞态”为后续优化，而不是本任务阻塞项。

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260707-160855-修复-ypi-studio-sdk-runner-preflight-回退-cli-问题/review.md",
  "content": "# review

## Check Complete

### Findings Fixed

- None.

### Remaining Findings

- Non-blocking: `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` now registers a temporary SDK runtime handle before the real SDK runner handle exists. This fixes `runtime_lost`, but if a user cancels an async run during that short preflight window, the placeholder `abort` is a no-op and the later real handle can overwrite the cancelled state. I did not see evidence this breaks the task acceptance, but it is a narrow cancellation race worth follow-up if async cancel during SDK preflight matters.

### Verification

- `npm run test:studio-sdk-runner` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

### Verdict

- Pass — core acceptance is covered: missing SDK child JSONL now gets a compatible header, auto fallback preserves SDK preflight diagnostics in run progress/warnings, forced-SDK async failures are persisted as real failed runs instead of only `runtime_lost`, and docs/script updates are present.
"
}

implementationPlan.summary: 修复 YPI Studio SDK child runner 在 session JSONL 尚未落盘时写 header 导致 ENOENT 并回退 CLI 的问题，同时增强 fallback/failed 诊断持久化。

subtasks.title: 修复 SDK child session header 创建与写入时机
instructions: 在 childSessionFile 不存在时创建兼容 session header，而不是 readFileSync 失败。
确认 SDK child run 开始后 task run/transcript 含 childSessionId/childSessionFile。
acceptance: 强制 sdk 不再因 ENOENT preflight 失败
生成的 child JSONL header 可被 session-reader 识别为 studioChild

subtasks.title: 持久化 auto fallback 与强制 sdk async 失败诊断
instructions: auto fallback 时将 SDK preflight error 保留到 run warnings/summary，避免被 CLI final snapshot 覆盖。
runner=sdk 且 async preflight/prompt 前失败时，立刻持久化 failed run 与 failed transcript，包含真实 error/terminationReason。
避免 poll/collect 将真实错误覆盖成 runtime_lost。
acceptance: auto fallback 可在 task run 中看到 SDK preflight 错误
强制 sdk async 失败不再只显示 runtime_lost

subtasks.title: 补充验证脚本/文档并运行验证
instructions: 增加低成本测试或脚本验证 header helper 能在文件不存在时创建 studioChild header。
更新 docs，说明 SDK runner 不依赖外部 CLI，CLI 仅为显式回滚/fallback。
运行 npm run lint 与 node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit；如增加测试脚本也运行。
acceptance: 文档反映 runner 行为与诊断边界
